<!-- delete the ones that don't apply -->
feat · fix · docs · chore · refactor · test · perf · ci

## Definition of Done
- [ ] Builds locally (`npm run build`)
- [ ] Lint passes, no new errors (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] Tests pass (`npm test`); money paths covered if touched
- [ ] DB changes ship as a backward-safe Prisma migration (or N/A)
- [ ] No secrets committed
- [ ] CI Gate green
